collision_cooldowns.description: Ship collision applies the SC2 collision turn and thrust wait values

collision_existing_cooldowns.description: Ship collision does not reduce existing cooldowns when they are already higher

collision_head_on.description: Two equal-mass human ships collide head-on

collision_moving_into_stationary.description: One human ship collides head-on with a stationary equal-mass ship

collision_asymmetric_head_on.description: Two equal-mass human ships collide head-on with different speeds

thrust_straight.description: Human Cruiser facing right, thrust every frame for 60 frames

turn_and_thrust.description: Turn left 4 steps then thrust for 30 frames

max_speed.description: Thrust for 120 frames to reach and stay at max speed

thrust_at_angle.description: Reach max speed facing right, then turn and thrust at angle

energy.description: Fire weapon twice, then wait for energy regen

all_facings.description: Velocity vector for each of the 16 ship facings at max thrust

gravity_well.description: Ship near planet, no thrust, gravity pulls it in

gravity_whip.description: Ship thrusts toward planet, enters gravity well, exceeds max speed

human_nuke_straight.description: Human Cruiser nuke fired straight ahead without tracking

human_nuke_homing.description: Human Cruiser nuke tracks a slowly moving target ship
